gmd:metadataStandardName.gco:CharacterString: ISO 19115-2 Geographic Information - Metadata - Part 2: Extensions for Imagery and Gridded Data

gmd:title.gco:CharacterString: NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information

gmd:organisationName.gco:CharacterString: NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information

gmd:protocol.gco:CharacterString: The connection protocol to be used such as http, ftp, etc.

gmd:name.gco:CharacterString: Background Information Name of the online resource.

gmd:description.gco:CharacterString: Background information from the source. Description of the online resource that provides the resource sought.

gmd:abstract.gco:CharacterString: Demonstration UxS acquisition for swarm import QA: UUV hydrography in the Gulf of Mexico with CTD and ADCP, May 2024.

gmd:purpose.gco:CharacterString: Validate catalog-ready metadata assembly for Navy UxS templates in the metadata pilot.

gmd:name.gco:CharacterString: NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information

gmd:keyword.gco:CharacterString: Oceans > Ocean Temperature > Sea Surface Temperature

gmd:thesaurusName.xlink:title: Global Change Master Directory (GCMD) Science Keywords

gmd:keyword.gco:CharacterString: Gulf of Mexico > Gulf of Mexico, North > Gulf of Mexico Basin

gmd:keyword.gco:CharacterString: DOC/NOAA/NESDIS/NCEI > National Centers for Environmental Information, NESDIS, NOAA, U.S. Department of Commerce
DOC/NOAA/NESDIS/NCEI > National Centers for Environmental Information, NESDIS, NOAA, U.S. Department of Commerce

gmd:thesaurusName.xlink:title: Global Change Master Directory (GCMD) Data Center Keywords

gmd:otherConstraints.gco:CharacterString: Cite as: NOAA NCEI (2024) UxS swarm demo dataset.

gmd:title.gco:CharacterString: Archived related glider transect dataset (demo reference)
Demo publication for Navy UxS swarm metadata validation

gmd:supplementalInformation.gco:CharacterString: Synthetic-but-valid values for automated swarm audit.

gmd:keyword.gco:CharacterString: U.S. Navy > United States Department of Defense > Department of the Navy

gmd:thesaurusName.xlink:title: Global Change Master Directory (GCMD) Provider Keywords

gmd:fees.gco:CharacterString: In most cases, electronic downloads of the data are free. However, fees may apply for custom orders, data certifications, copies of analog materials, and data distribution on physical media.

gmd:orderingInstructions.gco:CharacterString: Contact NCEI for other distribution options and instructions.

gmd:description.gco:CharacterString: Gridded demonstration extract for swarm import QA.

gmi:description.gco:CharacterString: Bluefin-21 class UUV with standard sensor payload for hydrographic sorties.
